false_positives.what_happened: tinyXML2 is a vendored third-party XML library. During an edit it existed transiently as tinyxml2.cpp + tinyxml2b.cpp + tinyxml2c.cpp (a manual split of one amalgamated file); the current tree has only tinyxml2.cpp. The verbatim cross-file hits are vendored code reassembled from its own temporary split.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: directory/name vendoring filter for tinyXML2 (and known amalgamated single-file libs); plus the deleted-source-side suppression already proposed for moves.

false_positives.where: server/cli/db/EventLoopPostgresql.cpp vs (deleted) server/epoll/db/EpollPostgresql.cpp; server/base/BaseServer/* vs (deleted) server/base/*; client/libqtcatchchallenger/maprender/* vs (deleted) client/qtmaprender/*
false_positives.what_happened: A sweeping rename/relocation: the Epoll* server backend was renamed to EventLoop* and moved cli/, BaseServer sources moved into a BaseServer/ subdir, and qtmaprender/ was relocated under libqtcatchchallenger/maprender/. The source paths (server/epoll/, server/base/BaseServer2.cpp, client/qtmaprender/) no longer exist in the tree. These are file moves/renames, not maintained duplicate copies.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: suppress pairs whose BASE path is deleted by the same commit (treat as move/rename). Optionally detect rename via git --find-renames and exclude the renamed pair.

note: 121 hits dominated by (a) vendored tinyXML2 amalgamation split and (b) a large Epoll->EventLoop backend rename + directory relocations. All moves/vendor; no live author copypaste confirmed. sccs=0.
